description: Catalog of standard legal agreement templates curated from Common Paper. Each template is a Markdown document stored in the templates/ directory.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Standard addendum covering the use of artificial intelligence, to be attached to an existing agreement between the parties.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
templates.description: Standard Business Associate Agreement governing the handling of protected health information (PHI) in compliance with HIPAA.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
templates.description: Standard Cloud Service Agreement standard terms for providing access to a cloud-based software service.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Standard agreement for collaborating with a design partner to develop and provide feedback on a new product or feature.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
templates.description: Standard Data Processing Agreement covering the processing of personal data on behalf of a customer in line with data protection laws.

templates.name: Mutual NDA - Standard Terms
templates.description: Standard Terms for a Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement governing the exchange of confidential information between two parties.

templates.name: Mutual NDA - Cover Page
templates.description: Cover Page for the Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, capturing the party-specific variables that incorporate the Standard Terms by reference.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Standard Partnership Agreement establishing a referral, reseller, or other commercial partnership between two companies.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Standard Pilot Agreement for running a time-limited trial or proof-of-concept of a product or service.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
templates.description: Standard Professional Services Agreement covering the delivery of professional or consulting services and related deliverables.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
templates.description: Standard Service Level Agreement defining service availability commitments, support response times, and remedies.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Standard Software License Agreement standard terms for licensing software to a customer.
